title: senecio medius
intro: Senecio medius, also known as Jerusalem sage or Blue spurrey, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diuretic, an expectorant, and a demulcent, helping to relieve coughs, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio medius include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio medius typically involve the use of the leaves or roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
